challenges.title: Simple Table
challenges.description: Create a table with a <thead> containing one row of <th> header cells (at least 2 columns) and a <tbody> containing at least 3 rows of <td> data cells. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a
element' assert '
' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert html.lower().count('') >= 4, 'Should have at least 4 rows (1 header + 3 data)' assert html.lower().count('
') >= 2, 'Should have at least 2 header cells' assert html.lower().count('
') >= 6, 'Should have at least 6 data cells (2 columns x 3 rows)'
hints: Use <th> for header cells in <thead> and <td> for data cells in <tbody>

challenges.title: Complex Table
challenges.description: Create a table with a <caption>, <thead>, and <tbody>. At least one cell should use the colspan attribute to span multiple columns. Include at least 2 columns and 2 data rows. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Write your table with caption and colspan -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a
element' assert '
' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the ' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert 'colspan' in html.lower(), 'Should have at least one cell using the colspan attribute' assert html.lower().count('') >= 3, 'Should have at least 3 rows (1 header + 2 data)' assert html.lower().count('
' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element' assert ' element' assert '
') >= 2, 'Should have at least 2 header cells'
hints: Place <caption> right after the opening <table> tag, before <thead>
Use colspan="2" on a or to make it span 2 columns, e.g., Spanning cell
